stereotype: «Engine» — pure (model, format) → bytes transformation; no I/O on the sync read/display path; reclassified from ResourceAccess 2026-05-27
volatility: ArtifactRendering volatility — how the canonical typed Method models are rendered for human consumption: the architecture model renders to diagrams (d2 today, Structurizr CLI + PlantUML superseded); use cases render to activity diagrams; text-shaped models render to Markdown/PDF. The engine, output format, and model→bytes mapping are all internal to this seam.

outbound.name: renderingToolchain
outbound.how: direct subprocess invocation (d2 CLI) on sync read path only — never from replayed workflow code

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic derivation of (System, format); no idempotency key needed
ops.note: Render the canonical typed static-architecture model to a diagram (C4 via d2) in the requested format; nothing is stored

fields.name: System
fields.note: canonical typed static-architecture model (Components, Relationships, DynamicViews); defined in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3.3

fields.name: Format
fields.note: RenderFormat int — FormatStructurizrDSL | FormatPlantUML | FormatPNG | FormatSVG | FormatMarkdown | FormatPDF | FormatD2; closed enum growing additively

fields.name: Bytes
fields.note: rendered output bytes (d2 source, PNG/SVG image, etc.); opaque to caller beyond MIMEType

fields.name: MIMEType
fields.note: content type of Bytes (e.g. image/png, image/svg+xml, text/vnd.structurizr.dsl); set from RenderFormat

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Transient | Infrastructure (retryable); RenderFailed | UnsupportedFormat | ContractMisuse (terminal) — temporary use of fwra.Error pending FU-RE-1 migration to engine.Error

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic derivation of (UseCase, format); no idempotency key needed
ops.note: Render the canonical typed use-case / activity-diagram model to a diagram (activity via d2) in the requested format; nothing is stored

fields.name: UseCase
fields.note: canonical typed use-case model (Actors, Trigger, Classification, Activity *ActivityDiagram); defined in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3.4

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic derivation of (ArtifactModel, format); dispatches on model.Kind()
ops.note: Render any member of the closed typed ArtifactModel sum (text-shaped: Markdown/PDF via template; diagram-shaped: delegates to d2 pipeline) in the requested format

fields.name: Model
fields.note: closed interface every typed Method model implements (sealed by unexported method); Kind() discriminates — MissionStatement | Glossary | Volatilities | CoreUseCases | System | UseCase | OperationalConcepts | StandardCheck | Phase-2 models; defined in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3.1

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Transient | Infrastructure (retryable); RenderFailed | UnsupportedFormat (unsupported model-shape/format pair) | ContractMisuse (nil model or zero-value format) — all terminal except transient/infrastructure

dataContracts: RenderFormat = int enum { FormatStructurizrDSL, FormatPlantUML, FormatPNG, FormatSVG, FormatMarkdown, FormatPDF, FormatD2 } // closed enum that grows additively; unsupported (model-shape, format) pair → UnsupportedFormat error
RenderedArtifact = { Bytes []byte; MIMEType string } // ephemeral derivation — never stored as a Method artifact
System // canonical typed static-architecture model; defined in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3.3
UseCase // canonical typed use-case model; defined in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3.4
ArtifactModel // closed interface every typed Method model implements; defined in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3.1
fwra.Error // shared RA error model used as a temporary deviation (FU-RE-1); kinds used: Transient, Infrastructure, RenderFailed, UnsupportedFormat, ContractMisuse
errorModel: framework-go/resourceaccess.Error (temporary deviation from canonical engine.Error — FU-RE-1, routed to C-RE construction review). Kinds: Transient (retryable), Infrastructure (retryable), RenderFailed (terminal — engine ran but could not produce output for this model+format), UnsupportedFormat (terminal — unsupported (model-shape, format) pair), ContractMisuse (terminal — nil model or zero-value format).
idempotency: No idempotency key on any verb — rendering mutates nothing and is a deterministic pure derivation; identical inputs produce identical bytes (modulo non-semantic embedded timestamps to be suppressed by C-ARA). No dedup ledger needed.

revisions.summary: NET-NEW contract created when ArtifactRendering volatility was promoted and ArtifactSchema retired; initial design as ResourceAccess with 3 verbs (renderSystem/renderUseCase/renderArtifact) backed by Structurizr CLI + PlantUML
SENIOR REVIEW PASSED — verdict pass, no amendments; confirmed 3-op shape, no idempotency key, Engine vs RA placement (it does I/O → RA), format as closed enum growing additively

Reclassified from ResourceAccess to Engine (RenderingEngine at internal/engine/rendering/); rendering is a model→bytes transformation, not persistence; subprocess I/O acceptable because rendering is on sync read path only, never from replayed workflow code. 3 verbs unchanged.

ENGINE-LAYER RE-CLASSIFICATION APPROVED. Engine layer confirmed correct; App C §6 9/9 PASS under Engine rules. Two non-blocking fixes: FU-RE-1 (error model fwra.Error→engine.Error migration, routed to C-RE); FU-RE-2 (DSL Engine→Resource edge, resolved).
Rendering toolchain updated to d2 (replaces Structurizr CLI + PlantUML pair). FormatD2 constant added additively. No surface change; contract surface remains frozen.
